raw_input: Hi, I'm Karen Migliori, consulting team manager at Deloitte. We use Monday.com for project tracking but our team's biggest pain is email overload—we need something that integrates with Outlook so people can see tasks without context switching. Can you tell me how ItsJen integrates with both? Also, we have a Thursday deadline for our decision, so time is tight. Thanks.

expected_routing.reason: high-urgency prospect with clear need, Thursday deadline creates time pressure
